subject: fix(header): move burger menu into headerTitle for full-width row
body:
React Navigation adds padding/margin between headerTitle and headerRight
containers on web, creating a gap that prevented the title row from
stretching to the burger menu. Moving everything into a single flex
row inside headerTitle eliminates the gap. headerTitleContainerStyle
overrides the default absolute positioning to fill the full width.

Tags: ui, header, layout
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: theme-system
Semver: patch
